title: Update CLI UX documentation for provenance and JSON contracts
description:
Update only the documentation and command help touched by the first CLI UX slice so users can discover version provenance, improved remediation output, and standardized JSON contracts.

## Background

This task is intentionally scoped to the changed CLI surfaces. It does not include the broader documentation site/tooling decision or a new Web UI feature.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] CLI reference documentation includes `jit --version` and `jit version` usage, including JSON output.
- [ ] Documentation or help examples explain the improved state/gate remediation output.
- [ ] JSON response contract documentation matches the standardized output shapes.
- [ ] No unrelated docs site/tooling changes are included.
